case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HAYON BEVERLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,531.00 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HAYON BEVERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYON BEVERLY $1,531.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,559.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
